title: Hertia intermedia
taxonomy: Hertia intermedia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. It belongs to the tribe Gnaphalieae, which comprises various daisy-like plants. Within the genus Hertia, H. intermedia is a distinct species that can be found in certain regions. The classification of Hertia intermedia reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants and its unique characteristics. Hertia intermedia's classification also helps in understanding its distribution, growth habits, and potential uses.
